summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Axon Agent AI coding platform. All backend APIs working correctly with real integrations (Groq, E2B, Tavily). Frontend authentication, chat functionality, and layout working as expected. Minor mobile interaction issues identified but core functionality intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab buttons have click interception issues on mobile viewport
Overlay click timeout on mobile - element interception by scrollable div

passed_tests: Chat creation via New Chat button
Chat messaging with AI streaming response
Main app layout (sidebar + chat + preview panels)
Real API integrations (Groq LLM, E2B sandbox, Tavily search)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor mobile interaction issues)
